subsystem_boundary: redis-commands command metadata and CONFIG compatibility only; SORT execution, runtime ownership, reference sources, and harness oracles were not changed.
changes: Added dispatcher-visible generated command spec lookup for registered commands only.
Implemented COMMAND GETKEYS metadata handling, including upstream-shaped SORT and SORT_RO key extraction.
Mapped legacy list-max-ziplist-size CONFIG GET/SET to the live list-max-listpack-size value.
Recorded focused TCL frontier docs with remaining sort failures scoped as telemetry.
